title: How to request accessible services - Canada.ca
content:
## How to request accessible services
If you can’t use our website or access a form, document or application, you can request an alternate format. These formats are available in
This won’t affect the status of your application.

## Request an accommodation
You can request an alternate format through the following channels:
By phone (in Canada only)
- Telephone: 1-888-242-2100
- Teletypewriter (TTY) services, using the Bell Relay Service: 1-800-855-0511 (voice to TTY) 711 (TTY to voice) 1-800-855-1155 (TTY to TTY)
- 1-800-855-0511 (voice to TTY)
- 1-800-855-1155 (TTY to TTY)

## Share your experience with our services
Describe any accessibility barriers you have experienced at Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada while receiving services from us. Your feedback will help us create a more accessible and barrier-free Canada.
